ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, CONSOLIDATE ARBITRATIONS AND STAY ACTION, AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-23-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BRIDGEVIEW DEVELOPMENT, LLC, EMERALD FUND, INC. AND PACIFIC MARKETING ASSOCIATES, INC.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, CONSOLIDATE ARBTRATIONS AND STAY ACTION, AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES: MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED ON ALL CLAIMS EXCEPT THE REQUEST FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF UNDER B&P CODE SECTION 17200 WHICH SHALL BE HEARD BY THE COURT FOLLOWING THE ARBITRATION. THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF THE ARBITRATION. THE ARBITRATION OF THESE DISPUTES SHALL BE CONSOLIDATED WITH THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS ALREADY FILED BY PLAINTIFFS WITH AAA. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS BY EACH SIDE IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-30-2004 CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIDGEVIEW DEVELOPMENT, LLC EMERALD FUND, INC. PACIFIC MARKETING ASSOCIATES, INC. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HWEE, PHILLIP HWEE, CHARK K HWEE, MARGARET JURY DEMANDED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-27-2004 CONTINUED TO FEB-18-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-18-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
